CurrentIssues.ID: ArgumentListWrapping:CodeQualityConfigurable.kt$CodeQualityConfigurable$("SonarQube project key for quality analysis. Use Browse to search or Auto-detect from pom.xml.")
ArgumentListWrapping:CoverageThresholdsTest.kt$CoverageThresholdsTest$(CoverageThresholds.colorForGateMetric(85.0, null), "no gate condition for the metric → no opinion")

ArgumentListWrapping:IssueDetailPanel.kt$IssueDetailPanel$("Read the file, understand the context, apply a minimal fix that resolves the issue without changing behavior, and verify it compiles with diagnostics.")

ArgumentListWrapping:IssueListPanel.kt$IssueListPanel$("Read the file, understand the context, apply a minimal fix that resolves the issue without changing behavior, and verify it compiles with diagnostics.")
ArgumentListWrapping:IssueMapperTest.kt$IssueMapperTest$( key = "k$i", rule = "r", severity = "MAJOR", message = "m", component = "p:k:src/F.kt", type = t )
ArgumentListWrapping:IssueMapperTest.kt$IssueMapperTest$( key = "k$i", rule = "r", severity = sev, message = "m", component = "p:k:src/F.kt", type = "BUG" )
ArgumentListWrapping:IssueMapperTest.kt$IssueMapperTest$( key = "k1", rule = "r", severity = "INFO", message = "msg", component = "p:k:src/File.kt", type = "CODE_SMELL", textRange = null )
ArgumentListWrapping:IssueMapperTest.kt$IssueMapperTest$( key = "k1", rule = "r", severity = "MAJOR", message = "m", component = "p:k:src/F.kt", type = "BUG" )

ArgumentListWrapping:IssueMapperTest.kt$IssueMapperTest$( key = "k1", rule = "r", severity = "MAJOR", message = "m", component = "p:k:src/F.kt", type = "BUG", impacts = listOf( SonarImpactDto(softwareQuality = "AVAILABILITY", severity = "EXTREME"), ), )
ArgumentListWrapping:IssueMapperTest.kt$IssueMapperTest$( key = "k1", rule = "r", severity = "MAJOR", message = "msg", component = "org.example:proj:src/main/java/Foo.java", type = "CODE_SMELL" )
ArgumentListWrapping:QualityDashboardPanel.kt$QualityDashboardPanel$("SonarQube project key not configured for $repoName \u2014 configure in Settings > CI/CD")
ArgumentListWrapping:QualityDashboardPanel.kt$QualityDashboardPanel$("SonarQube project key not configured for ${pr.repoName} \u2014 configure in Settings > CI/CD")
ArgumentListWrapping:SonarApiClient.kt$SonarApiClient$( projectKey, branch, filePath, inNewCodePeriod, effectivePage, effectivePageSize )
ArgumentListWrapping:SonarApiClient.kt$SonarApiClient$("[Sonar:API] $logTag: hit MAX_ISSUES_PAGES=$MAX_ISSUES_PAGES cap — returning ${allItems.size} items (project may have more)")
ArgumentListWrapping:SonarApiClient.kt$SonarApiClient$("[Sonar:API] $logTag: mid-pagination error on page $page — returning ${allItems.size} items collected so far")

ArgumentListWrapping:SonarApiClient.kt$SonarApiClient$("[Sonar:API] GET /api/issues/search for project '$projectKey' branch='${branch ?: "default"}' file='${filePath ?: "all"}' newCode=$inNewCodePeriod")
ArgumentListWrapping:SonarApiClient.kt$SonarApiClient$("[Sonar:API] GET /api/sources/lines for component '$componentKey' branch='${branch ?: "default"}' from=$from to=$to")
ArgumentListWrapping:SonarApiClient.kt$SonarApiClient$("[Sonar:API] Hit MAX_MEASURES_PAGES=$MAX_MEASURES_PAGES; returning ${all.size} components (project may have more)")

ArgumentListWrapping:SonarApiClient.kt$SonarApiClient.Companion$( SonarMetricKey.SQALE_INDEX, SonarMetricKey.SQALE_RATING, SonarMetricKey.DUPLICATED_LINES_DENSITY, SonarMetricKey.COGNITIVE_COMPLEXITY, SonarMetricKey.RELIABILITY_RATING, SonarMetricKey.SECURITY_RATING, SonarMetricKey.COVERAGE, SonarMetricKey.BRANCH_COVERAGE, )

ArgumentListWrapping:SonarBranchReportGateAndDupTest.kt$SonarBranchReportGateAndDupTest$("ERROR", result.data!!.qualityGate.status, "server ERROR must not be downgraded to WARN by the new-code recompute")

ArgumentListWrapping:SonarBranchReportGateAndDupTest.kt$SonarBranchReportGateAndDupTest$(fileReport.duplicatedLineRanges.isEmpty(), "a dup block belonging to another module's Service.kt must not be attributed to this file")
ArgumentListWrapping:SonarDataService.kt$SonarDataService$("[Sonar:LineCoverage] Failed to fetch line coverage for '$componentKey': ${result.message}")
ArgumentListWrapping:SonarDataServiceConcurrencyTest.kt$SonarDataServiceConcurrencyTest$("proj-b", state.projectKey, "state must reflect branch-B, not stale branch-A data")
ArgumentListWrapping:SonarDataServiceConcurrencyTest.kt$SonarDataServiceConcurrencyTest$(1, harness.closedCount.get(), "old URL-A client closed exactly once when replaced")
ArgumentListWrapping:SonarDataServiceConcurrencyTest.kt$SonarDataServiceConcurrencyTest$(2, harness.createdCount.get(), "exactly one new client for URL-B — the mutex prevented extra creation")

ArgumentListWrapping:SonarDataServiceConcurrencyTest.kt$SonarDataServiceConcurrencyTest$(nonCommentLines.contains("scope.async"), "refreshWith must not use scope.async (would escape structured cancellation)")
ArgumentListWrapping:SonarDataServiceConcurrencyTest.kt$SonarDataServiceConcurrencyTest$(src.contains("activeRefreshJob?.cancel()"), "activeRefreshJob must be cancelled when a new refresh starts")
ArgumentListWrapping:SonarDataServiceConcurrencyTest.kt$SonarDataServiceConcurrencyTest$(src.contains("cachedApiClient?.close()"), "must close old client before replacing (OkHttp pool eviction)")

ArgumentListWrapping:SonarDataServiceConcurrencyTest.kt$SonarDataServiceConcurrencyTest$(src.contains("coroutineScope {"), "refreshWith must use coroutineScope { } (not scope.async) for structured concurrency")
ArgumentListWrapping:SonarDtoSerializationTest.kt$SonarDtoSerializationTest$(dto.permissions!!.global.isEmpty(), "probe was run with non-admin token; permissions.global should be empty")

ArgumentListWrapping:SonarDtoSerializationTest.kt$SonarDtoSerializationTest$(dto.rule.fixRecommendations.contains("SecureRandom"), "fixRecommendations must contain the SecureRandom Compliant Solution example")

ArgumentListWrapping:SonarDtoSerializationTest.kt$SonarDtoSerializationTest$(response.qualitygates.all { !it.isAiCodeSupported }, "Community Build returns isAiCodeSupported=false on every gate (R-ADD-AGENT-4)")

ArgumentListWrapping:SonarDtoSerializationTest.kt$SonarDtoSerializationTest$(result.facets.any { it.property == "impactSoftwareQualities" }, "expected impactSoftwareQualities facet on the probe sample")

ArgumentListWrapping:SonarFixIntentionAction.kt$SonarFixIntentionAction$("Read the file, understand the surrounding code, apply a minimal fix that resolves the issue without changing behavior, and verify with diagnostics that the fix compiles.")

ArgumentListWrapping:SonarServiceImpl.kt$SonarServiceImpl$( SonarMetricKey.RELIABILITY_RATING, SonarMetricKey.SECURITY_RATING, SonarMetricKey.SQALE_RATING, SonarMetricKey.COVERAGE, SonarMetricKey.DUPLICATED_LINES_DENSITY, SonarMetricKey.SQALE_DEBT_RATIO, SonarMetricKey.NCLOC, )

ArgumentListWrapping:SonarServiceImpl.kt$SonarServiceImpl$( api, info.componentKey, info.filePath, branch, FileQualityReportInfo( newUncoveredLines = info.newUncoveredLines, newUncoveredConditions = info.newUncoveredConditions, newLineCoverage = info.newLineCoverage, newBranchCoverage = info.newBranchCoverage, newDuplicatedLines = info.newDuplicatedLines ) )

ArgumentListWrapping:SonarServiceImpl.kt$SonarServiceImpl$( key = dto.key, message = dto.message, component = dto.component, line = dto.line, securityCategory = dto.securityCategory, probability = dto.vulnerabilityProbability, status = dto.status, resolution = dto.resolution )
ArgumentListWrapping:SonarServiceImpl.kt$SonarServiceImpl$( login = "", name = "", email = null, groups = emptyList(), globalPermissions = emptyList(), externalProvider = null, isLoggedIn = false )

ArgumentListWrapping:SonarServiceImpl.kt$SonarServiceImpl$("[SonarService] componentExists preflight failed (${precheck.type}: ${precheck.message}); proceeding to issues search — a flaky preflight will not block the main fetch")
ArgumentListWrapping:SonarServiceImpl.kt$SonarServiceImpl$(metric = c.metricKey, operator = c.comparator, value = c.actualValue, status = c.status)
ArgumentListWrapping:SonarServiceImpl.kt$SonarServiceImpl$(projectKey, branch = branch, filePath = filePath, inNewCodePeriod = inNewCodePeriod)

import com.workflow.orchestrator.core.model.sonar.DuplicationData import com.workflow.orchestrator.core.model.sonar.DuplicationBlock import import com.workflow.orchestrator.core.model.sonar.IssueFacetValue import com.workflow.orchestrator.core.model.sonar.IssueFacetsData import MultiLineIfElse:SonarKeyDetector.kt$SonarKeyDetector$mavenManager.rootProjects.firstOrNull() ?: run { log.debug("[Sonar:Detect] No root Maven projects"); null }

MultiLineIfElse:SonarServiceImpl.kt$SonarServiceImpl$return ToolResult( data = emptyList(), summary = "SonarQube project '$projectKey' not found.", isError = true, hint = "Verify the project key. Maven artifact keys like 'group:artifact' often map to plain 'artifact' in SonarQube — try the short form or search via the Quality dashboard." )
ParameterListWrapping:CoverageTablePanel.kt$CoverageTablePanel.<no name provided>$( table: JTable, value: Any?, isSelected: Boolean, hasFocus: Boolean, row: Int, column: Int )
ParameterListWrapping:CoverageTablePanel.kt$CoverageTablePanel.ComplexityCellRenderer$( table: JTable, value: Any?, isSelected: Boolean, hasFocus: Boolean, row: Int, column: Int )
ParameterListWrapping:IssueListPanel.kt$IssueListCellRenderer$( list: JList<out QualityListItem>, value: QualityListItem, index: Int, isSelected: Boolean, cellHasFocus: Boolean )
PropertyWrapping:CoverageTablePanel.kt$CoverageTableModel$private val newCodeColumns = arrayOf("File", "New Coverage %", "New Branch %", "New Uncov. Lines", "New Lines", "Complexity", "Cognitive")

SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:CoverageLineMarkerProvider.kt$CoverageLineMarkerProvider.Companion$/** * Per-project map tracking which files have an in-flight line coverage fetch * to avoid duplicate requests. Scoped to projects so disposal is clean. */
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:CoveragePreviewPanel.kt$CoveragePreviewPanel$/** The owning repo's local root, captured from the row's projectKey at [showFile] time. */
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:QualityDashboardPanel.kt$QualityDashboardPanel$// Phase 5 T15: amber banner shown when interactionMode == ReadOnly (spec §7.1).

Wrapping:OverviewPanel.kt$OverviewPanel$("COVERAGE", coverageLabel, JPanel(BorderLayout()).apply { isOpaque = false add(coverageBar, BorderLayout.NORTH) add(branchCoverageLabel, BorderLayout.CENTER) }, ACCENT_COVERAGE)
